SELECT toUInt256(value) FROM test_table WHERE value NOT LIKE '%[^0-9]%' AND toUInt256(value) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT toUInt256(value) FROM test_table WHERE value LIKE '%.%' AND value NOT LIKE '%NaN%' AND value NOT LIKE '%Infinity%';
SELECT toUInt256(value) AS uint_value FROM test_table WHERE value IN ('0', '1', '256', '9999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999');
CREATE TABLE nested_table (id UInt8, num String);
SELECT id, toUInt256(num) AS converted_num FROM nested_table WHERE id <= 3;
SELECT t1.id, toUInt256(t2.num) FROM nested_table AS t1 JOIN nested_table AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE t1.id < 3;
SELECT AVG(toUInt256(value)) FROM test_table WHERE value NOT LIKE '%[^0-9]%' AND length(value) < 40;
SELECT toUInt256(ROUND(value, 0)) AS rounded_value FROM test_table WHERE value NOT LIKE '%NaN%' AND value NOT LIKE '%Infinity%';
WITH (SELECT max(toUInt256(value)) FROM test_table) AS max_value SELECT toUInt256(value) FROM test_table WHERE toUInt256(value) > max_value;
